title: Siyang Power Tools — 2026 Product Catalog
description: Complete product catalog featuring Siyang's full line of corded and cordless power tools including drill/drivers, angle grinders, circular saws, rotary hammers, and accessories. Includes specifications, part numbers, and packaging information for all current models.

title: SY-DD20V-BL 20V Brushless Drill/Driver — Specification Sheet
description: Detailed technical specification sheet for the SY-DD20V-BL 20V Brushless Drill/Driver. Includes performance curves, torque ratings, dimensional drawings, battery compatibility matrix, and compliance certifications.

title: Siyang 20V Platform — Firmware Update v3.2.1
description: Firmware update for all Siyang 20V brushless tools with smart connectivity. This update improves thermal management algorithm, enhances low-battery cutoff accuracy, and resolves an intermittent Bluetooth pairing issue. Compatible with SY-DD20V-BL, SY-AG18V-BL, and SY-CF20V-BL models manufactured after June 2025. Refer to the included README for installation instructions.
